item.text:
VERDICT: PENDING

I’m re-running the validator pass against the actual WP feature worktree. First step is the branch-local gate and the packet-scoped Rust tests the coder claims are green under a short `CARGO_TARGET_DIR`, then I’ll do a quick diff sanity check before issuing the verdict.
